# cattery-modules

cattery-modules — quick-start NixOS configurations with room-based module bundles

- [cattery-modules](/index): Quick-start NixOS configurations — choose a room, get a complete system
- [Quick Start](/quick-start): Get started with cattery-modules
- [Rooms](/rooms): Pre-configured module bundles for quick-start setups
- [Modules](/modules): Individual module reference for cattery-modules
